description: Boundary check for Task 29a contradiction scanner. Three groups of findings test: (1) same file + same symbol → candidate, (2) same file + no symbol + ranges within 5 lines → candidate, (3) same file + no symbol + ranges 7 lines apart → NOT a candidate.

consolidated_findings.title: Session not invalidated on password change
consolidated_findings.description: When a user changes their password, existing sessions are not invalidated, leaving potentially compromised sessions active.

consolidated_findings.title: Sessions correctly cleared on password change
consolidated_findings.description: The authenticateUser function does invalidate sessions on password change via the session manager — this is handled correctly.

consolidated_findings.title: Missing default for optional config key
consolidated_findings.description: parseConfig does not set a default for the 'timeout' key, causing a TypeError when config file omits it.

consolidated_findings.title: Timeout config key has fallback in parseConfig
consolidated_findings.description: parseConfig applies a default timeout value via nullish coalescing — the TypeError concern is not present.

consolidated_findings.title: Regex compiled on every parseConfig invocation
consolidated_findings.description: A validation regex is compiled inside parseConfig's main loop, wasting CPU on repeated compilations.

consolidated_findings.title: No repeated regex compilation observed in parseConfig
consolidated_findings.description: Inspection shows the regex is cached in a module-level constant, not re-compiled per invocation.

group_F1_F2.description: Same file + same symbol → contradiction candidate

group_F3_F4.description: Same file + no symbol + line ranges within 5 lines apart → contradiction candidate
group_F3_F4.proximity_calculation: F3 end=50, F4 start=48 → overlap; min distance=0 <= 5 threshold

group_F5_F6.description: Same file + no symbol + line ranges 7 lines apart → NOT a contradiction candidate (boundary)
group_F5_F6.proximity_calculation: F5 end=18, F6 start=60 → gap of 42 lines; 42 > 5 threshold → NOT a candidate

notes.boundary_rule: For no-symbol findings in the same file: proximity is checked using min distance between line ranges. Distance = max(0, start_B - end_A, start_A - end_B). If distance <= threshold (5), it's a candidate.
notes.F3_F4_proximity: F3 range [45,50], F4 range [48,53] → they overlap (start_F4=48 < end_F3=50), so distance=0 → candidate
notes.F5_F6_distance: F5 range [10,18], F6 range [60,68] → distance = 60 - 18 = 42 > 5 → NOT a candidate
notes.same_symbol_always_candidate: Same file + same non-null symbol is ALWAYS a candidate regardless of line range distance
